final_answer:
Yes. I removed the remaining runtime non-production bypass paths from `gilt-exec` and switched tests to explicit mock `GiltConsensus` clients.

Why it matters: Gold Chain runtime can no longer start in bypass modes, so validator/block-production behavior now depends on real `GiltConsensus` flows only, which keeps evidence and operations aligned with production architecture.

What I changed:
- Removed legacy config/CLI/runtime surfaces for `withoutgiltconsensus`, `devfakeauthor`, `gilt.rungiltconsensus`, and `gilt.usegiltconsensusapp` in:
  - [ethconfig config](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/eth/ethconfig/config.go)
  - [ethconfig generated TOML codec](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/eth/ethconfig/gen_config.go)
  - [geth main startup](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/cmd/geth/main.go)
  - [gilt flags wiring](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/cmd/utils/gilt_flags.go)
  - [server config/flags/command](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/internal/cli/server/config.go)
- Removed runtime `DevFakeAuthor` bypass behavior from consensus/miner paths:
  - [consensus engine](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/consensus/gilt/gilt.go)
  - [miner peer-gating path](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/miner/worker.go)
- Updated tests to use static/mock `GiltConsensus` instead of bypass mode:
  - [gilt integration helper](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/tests/gilt/helper.go)
  - [sprint-length integration helper](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/tests/gilt/gilt_sprint_length_change_test.go)
  - [checkpoint verifier integration test setup](/srv/repos/gold-chain/bridge/gilt-exec/eth/gilt_checkpoint_verifier_test.go)
- Cleaned templates/docs/config examples to remove old keys (builder, packaging templates, server docs/default config, config script map).

Checks run and passing:
- `go test ./eth/ethconfig ./eth ./cmd/geth ./cmd/utils ./internal/cli/server ./consensus/gilt ./miner ./tests/gilt ./scripts/... -run '^$' -tags=integration`
- `go test ./eth/ethconfig ./internal/cli/server`
- `go test ./eth -run 'Test(CheckpointMismatch_DoesNotRewind|MilestoneMismatch_UnknownHash_DoesNotRewind)' -count=1`

Next steps:
1. Review and commit only the `bridge/gilt-exec` changes.
2. If you want, I can do one more cleanup pass to rename old bypass wording that still exists only inside some consensus unit-test names/comments.
